message:
perf(cx): remove remaining lock-poison error paths from Cx and scope

cx.rs: Remove 4 remaining .expect("lock poisoned") calls in
checkpoint_state(), diagnostic_context(), log_collector(), and
trace_buffer() — these were missed in the earlier Cx migration commit
that converted the RwLock type but left a few accessor chains with
the old error pattern.

scope.rs: Simplify test assertion from .read().expect("lock poisoned")
to direct .read() in the scope cancellation propagation test.

obligation/lyapunov.rs: Replace if-let-Ok(read)/else-continue with
direct .read() in StateSnapshot's deadline budget scan, eliminating
the skip-on-poison path that could silently miss tasks with expired
deadlines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
